case_title: COURTNEY K. HALL VS. OFFICER BEGLEY (DCPD # 179)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, COURTNEY K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEGLEY (DCPD  # 179), OFFICER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2010 - CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
